description: Configure time-based routing for the 'Priority Support' inbound group (ID: PRISUP). Create a Call Time definition with ID 'PRISUP_HRS' and description 'Priority Support M-F 9-6' scheduled for Monday-Friday 09:00 to 18:00 (Closed Saturday/Sunday). Update the 'PRISUP' inbound group to use this call time, setting the after-hours action to 'VOICEMAIL' with mailbox '1000' and message 'vm-goodbye'. Starting credentials: User 6666 / Password 'andromeda'.
